task_completion.description: Open the flagged rocket file in OpenRocket
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenRocket application window. The title bar or the active design tab should display 'compliance_check' or 'compliance_check.ork'.

task_completion.description: Correct the drogue parachute deployment event
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Parachute configuration dialog for the drogue parachute. The 'Deploys at' dropdown should be set to 'Apogee'.

task_completion.description: Correct the main parachute deployment altitude
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Parachute configuration dialog for the main parachute. The deployment altitude should be set to 244 meters (or 800 feet) or lower.

task_completion.description: Correct the fin height for stability
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Fin set configuration dialog showing the 'Height' parameter set to 50 mm (5 cm) or greater, or observe the rocket diagram showing normally proportioned fins instead of tiny stubs.
Look at the 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket. There should be at least one simulation listed with a status of 'Up-to-date' (often indicated by a green checkmark) and flight data populated.

task_completion.description: Document the issues and resolutions in a compliance memo
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor window editing a file named 'compliance_memo.txt'. The text should mention fixing the drogue parachute, main parachute altitude, fin height, and running simulations.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the rocket
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent used the OpenRocket graphical interface to modify the rocket design, rather than editing the .ork XML file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent created the memo using a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the memo was written in a text editor GUI (like gedit or mousepad) or terminal editor, rather than just using terminal commands like 'echo' to bypass interaction.
Verify that the simulation tab shows actual flight data results (like apogee, max velocity) indicating the simulation was genuinely executed in the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires fixing four specific violations in 'compliance_check.ork': 1) Drogue deploy event must be set to 'apogee' (was altitude). 2) Main deploy altitude must be <= 244m or 800ft (was 500m). 3) Fin height must be >= 50mm to ensure stability (was 15mm). 4) Simulations must be re-run to 'up-to-date' status. Finally, a memo documenting these fixes must be created at '/home/ga/Documents/exports/compliance_memo.txt'.
